2266530.name: Beanz!?
2266530.description: In Beanz!? you play as a bean... It's an comedy FPS where you can play multiplayer against friends or random people in death match or team death match and there's a campaign. In the campaign you play as a bean that escaped from "Beanz Incorporated", the evil company that kills Beanz for consumption. You have to defeat "Beanz Incorporated" and free the Beanz. In multiplayer you can play Death Match or Team Death Match and try and win so you can earn points and buy new appearances for your bean. This is just a little taste of what you can experience in Beanz!?
2266530.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
